# Calculus

The **derivative** and the integral are the core of calculus. A theorem about
functions and their rates of change.

See [[Limits]] and [[Mechanics]] for where this leads.

Reference: [Khan Academy](https://www.khanacademy.org/calculus) and a handout
[[handout.pdf]]. Watch the [intro](https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123).
